If that also returns nothing, it needs a scraper fix (re-running won't help).

sources.label: serversupply.com
sources.reason: This vendor is blocked — an anti-bot wall we have no working path through right now — so re-running won't help. **What to do:** nothing in the app recovers this; getting it working needs deeper scraper changes and isn't guaranteed. Cloudflare bot-walled — same class as microcenter (ADR-088, probed 2026-05-25). The homepage returns a ~31.7 KB "Just a moment... / Performing security verification" Cloudflare interstitial (Ray ID, 0 product anchors) through AlterLab at tier 3 + networkidle. The 2026-05-17 detail-page capture was the identical challenge body (pinned barren by test_strip_real_botwall_fixture). No working path today. NOTE: previously (mis)tagged `alterlab_known_good: true` — false for a Cloudflare-walled host; removed. default_alterlab_options kept to document the max attempt.

sources.label: centralcomputer.com
sources.reason: This vendor is blocked — an anti-bot wall we have no working path through right now — so re-running won't help. **What to do:** nothing in the app recovers this; getting it working needs deeper scraper changes and isn't guaranteed. Cloudflare bot-walled — same class as microcenter (ADR-088, probed 2026-05-25). Search AND homepage return the SAME ~31.9 KB "Just a moment..." Cloudflare interstitial (Ray ID, cf-* markers, 0 product anchors) through AlterLab at tier 3 + networkidle. The 2026-05-17 detail-page capture was already the identical challenge body (pinned barren by test_strip_real_botwall_fixture). Detail URLs do NOT escape it either — there is no working path today. NOTE: this host was previously (mis)tagged `alterlab_known_good: true`; that asserted AlterLab renders it fine, which is false. Removed — a Cloudflare-walled host is the opposite of known-good. default_alterlab_options kept to document the max attempt and so the runtime sends the right options IF the wall lifts.
